# Quick Start

Welcome to **rfaf** markdown readability tests.

## Setup

- Install dependencies
- Run tests

Read [docs](https://example.com/docs) for more information.

![Screenshot](https://example.com/image.png)

| Step | Command |
| ---- | ------- |
| Build | `bun run build` |
| Test | `bun test` |

```bash
npm run build
```
